name: MikroTik Open Frame 750W PSU G1270
title: MikroTik Open Frame 750W PSU G1270
description: The MikroTik Open Frame 750W PSU is a powerful replacement power supply unit designed for the CRS354-48P-4S+2Q+RM switch, providing reliable and efficient power to ensure optimal performance. With an output voltage of 53V DC at 13.5A, this PSU is capable of powering a wide range of PoE (Power over Ethernet) devices connected to your network. Additionally, it offers 26.5V DC at 27A, ensuring that your switch operates at peak efficiency. This PSU is specifically tailored to meet the high power demands of large-scale network environments, where stable power is crucial for uninterrupted network operation. Built with high-quality components, G1270 guarantees long-lasting performance, making it a dependable choice for users who prioritize stability and power efficiency in their network infrastructure. Its construction is intended to seamlessly integrate into the CRS354-48P-4S+2Q+RM switch, enabling easy and quick replacement, minimizing downtime. The MikroTik Open Frame 750W PSU delivers a substantial 750 watts of power, making it ideal for high-demand network setups. Its wide input voltage range allows for flexible installation in different power infrastructures, ensuring global compatibility. Engineered to provide reliable and continuous power, this PSU is essential for maintaining the integrity and performance of the CRS354-48P-4S+2Q+RM switch in mission-critical environments.
